title: Adapter live-bound assertion + compatibility helper quarantine
intent: PolymarketV2Adapter.submit() asserts envelope.assert_live_submit_bound() before any SDK create_and_post_order/post_order call, so placeholder 'legacy:' compatibility envelopes cannot reach the live SDK contact path.

asserted_invariants.text: PolymarketV2Adapter.submit() invokes envelope.assert_live_submit_bound() (or rejects with BOUND_ENVELOPE_NOT_LIVE_AUTHORITY) before any client.create_and_post_order / client.create_order / client.post_order call. No SDK call executes if envelope.condition_id starts with 'legacy:' or envelope.question_id == 'legacy-compat'.

PolymarketV2Adapter.submit_limit_order() either (a) refuses to construct a placeholder envelope and returns SubmitResult(status='rejected', error_code='COMPAT_SUBMIT_NOT_PERMITTED_IN_LIVE'), or (b) is gated to test/fake mode only via an explicit boolean flag whose default is False.
In fake-SDK tests, fake_client.create_and_post_order.call_count == 0 and fake_client.post_order.call_count == 0 when the envelope is a 'legacy:'/'legacy-compat' placeholder.
compat_submit_rejected_total or placeholder_envelope_blocked_total counter is incremented exactly once per blocked attempt and persisted in the project's existing counter sink.

f1_evidence_sites: src/venue/polymarket_v2_adapter.py:312 def submit(...) — does NOT call assert_live_submit_bound() before SDK contact
src/venue/polymarket_v2_adapter.py:345 client.create_and_post_order(...) — first SDK contact path
src/venue/polymarket_v2_adapter.py:589 return self.submit(envelope) — connects compat helper to live SDK path
src/data/polymarket_client.py:407-424 already-present live-bound check on _pending_submission_envelope — pattern to follow
_planner_notes.topology_admission: BLOCKED at planner time — generic profile does not admit src/venue/polymarket_v2_adapter.py. Operator may need to add an 'r3 venue submit live-bound' digest profile before dispatch.
operator_only_blockers_at_planner_time: T0.2 RiskGuard still RUNNING (PID 14177); operator must unload before dispatch.
T0.3 venue quiescence not yet attested.
_planner_notes.k0_k1_classification: K0 LIVE BOUNDARY — venue submit path. Requires opus critic + security-reviewer per ORCHESTRATOR_RUNBOOK §12 T1F row.
_planner_notes.closeout_drift_resolution: T2F-DOC-DRIFT-CLEANED: typed counter sink landed in T2F B1 (2026-05-05). All T1 phases share src/observability/counters.py. No per-phase DDL or schema drift outstanding.
